summary: Set 065 Session 1 of 3: retrospective verification-surface bake-off over harvester 008-012 (n=5). Delivered bake-off-results.md + bake-off-data.json + forward-ab-design.md (all research/doc; no shipping-code change, no release). FINDINGS: promote path-aware STRONGLY supported (12 unique real defects routed missed, mostly Major + 2 wrong-data Criticals C9/C3); the win is BOTH context-access (isolated by 012 C3 same-provider GPT) AND provider-diversity (010 Gemini-only) -- entangled, unseparable at n=5; ~92% of catches PROBEABLE (-> pre-registered-falsifier/contract-test lever); 'is routed worth keeping' UNANSWERED (all routed-only catches order-confounded/out-of-scope; only evidenced defense is cadence -> needs forward Experiments A capability + B cadence). VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 cross-provider, R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Major cadence-test gap in the A/B design + 3 Minor overclaims) all fixed -> R2 VERIFIED 0 remaining, $0.086 routed.

reason.specifics: Architectural continuity is critical since S2 is a direct implementation spike based on S1's design work. Staying with the incumbent maintains context, minimizes risk, and avoids the overhead of onboarding a new model mid-project.
